message:
test(fuzz): ChaCha20/XChaCha20-Poly1305 AEAD primitives (mmkg3)

Add fuzz_aead_chacha20 covering fcp_crypto::aead AEAD primitives
(aead.rs:180-386) directly. Existing fuzz exercises these only via
ZoneKeyAlgorithm wrappers; the cipher/free-function/nonce surface
itself was unfuzzed. Properties: CC20 + XCC20 round-trips,
AAD/nonce/key/ciphertext binding (mutation → AeadDecryptFailed), free
function == method, encrypt_with_random_nonce + decrypt_with_prepended_nonce
round-trip, truncated prepended-nonce rejection (< 24+16 bytes),
ChaCha20Nonce::from_counter byte layout (counter @ 4..12 LE),
from_counter_directional layout (direction @ 0, counter @ 4..12 LE),
length gates on AeadKey/ChaCha20Nonce/XChaCha20Nonce::try_from_slice.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
